variants.description: Will you be able to place the arrow right into the bullseye?  It is not that easy, but once you know how it's done, you will have a lot of fun with archery.

"Become a more consistent and accurate archer!", The Archery Drill Book covers all aspects of the sport, with 130 of the best drills for developing superior technique, skill, physical stamina, and the focused mindset needed to shoot under pressure.
A beginner's guide to the equipment and shooting fundamentals that new shooters of all ages will benefit from.

name.str_pl: copies of Archery from A to Z (1)

variants.description: "Anecdotes of Archery - From the Earliest Ages to the Year 1791" - This vintage book contains a comprehensive guide to archery, with historical details, information on archery in different cultures throughout the ages, anecdotes of notable events and battles, a glossary of archery terms, and much more.

name.str_pl: copies of How to Succeed in Business (3)

variants.description: Useful if you want to get a good deal when purchasing goods.

variants.description: Comprehensive coverage of most major stock trading styles.

Written with hard prison slang, this book says a lot about how to use maximum power from your muscles and weight of your weapon.

name.str_pl: copies of Bludgeons and Broken Bones: A Reference Guide (1)

It also includes techniques for using bash weapons to defend against attackers armed with knives, guns, and other weapons.

A university-level textbook on advanced principles of physical chemistry and all its branches: thermochemistry, electrochemistry, solid-state chemistry, photochemistry, quantum chemistry et cetera.

name.str_pl: copies of A Literature Review on Cold Cracking of Petroleum Crude Oil (7)

name.str_pl: copies of Biodiesel Production: Technologies, Challenges, and Future Prospects (6)

A small book offering insights into plant-based fuels, with detailed analyses of biodiesel types, and possible scenarios for their implementation.  Sadly most of the book just repeats itself, writing the same text over and over again, which makes you feel you stuck in a constant loop.

A classic text, "The Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs." Written with examples in LISP, but applicable to any language.

A collection of photos of different dance movements of the world.  The images are inspiring, and the movements of the dancers are deep.

variants.description: Reviews of firearms, and various useful tips about their use.
Annual magazine about firearms, weapon collections, self-defense, same as some practical and legal advices.
A modern magazine about handguns, tactical weapons, knives, and shooting activities.  It says there is a fold-out target, but someone took it off.
"Special Weapons And Tactics for the prepared American", this magazine contains info about firearms, law enforcement, and related interests, with a focus on SWAT police officers.
Small magazine about ammo and firearms, and how to choose, use, and maintain them properly.
Modern magazine for young people about firearms, self-defense, different competitions, and reviews.

name.str_pl: copies of The Gun Owner's Handbook (3)

variants.description: A thick soft-cover book that claims to be a complete guide to safely operating, maintaining, and repairing firearms.

name.str_pl: copies of The Gun Owner's Handbook (3)

variants.description: Official U.S. Army manual about basics and tactics of moving and attacking a target - how to shoot, how to hide, how to retreat, and how to defend.

name.str_pl: copies of FM 3-90-1: Offense And Defense (3)

variants.description: A journal about modern and old firearms, their style, manufacturing, and usage.
Essential handbook detailing how to own, use, and properly maintain a modern-day firearm.

name.str_pl: copies of Owning a Modern Firearm (3)

variants.description: Step-by-step instructions on how to use a gun, with lot of drills for each level.
A reference book that contains hundreds of images of firearms inside, with lot of comments from professionals and information about each model.

name.str_pl: copies of The Illustrated History of Firearms (3)

variants.description: "The Complete Beginner's Guide to Precision Rifle Shooting", this book contains information about shooting equipment, terminology, principles, and covers the theory of long-range shooting.  It has a lot of practical advice about marksmanship.

name.str_pl: copies of Long Range Shooting Handbook (3)

variants.description: "A Practical Treatise on the Enfield-Pritchett Rifle, Recently Adopted in the British Service".  This is a practical guide to using the newly adopted P-1853 Enfield Rifle-Musket.  Despite being written in 1854, it still has lot of useful information about shooting, as well as information about how to maintain this antique rifle.

name.str_pl: copies of Pocket Guide to Firearm Safety (2)
copies of Ballistics: Theory, Design, and Application (2)

variants.description: This hefty, hardbound textbook is written in obtuse, complex language.  If you already knew a bit about engineering and fabrication, it might be a useful reference on gunsmithing and design, but without that knowledge it'd be better used to prop up a table.

name.str_pl: copies of Ballistics: Theory, Design, and Application (2)

variants.description: This fairly old book is a highly detailed and essential reference for any gun enthusiast, and covers everything from the use of proper tools to how to get a gunsmithing job.

name.str_pl: copies of The Complete Guide to Gunsmithing (2)

variants.description: A guide for gun shop owners, this book contains lots of information about weapons and weapon maintenance.

The book contains step-by-step instructions to repair and maintain all major rifle types, from the AR-15 and AK-47 to the M1 Garand.  It also details many different projects and enhancements for gun owners.

This book contains extremely precise instructions for fixing different issues with your gun.  Having lots of modern photos is a huge advantage, though the fact that it's a reprint of a book from the 1950s is not.

name.str: Gunsmithing: A Manual of Firearm Design, Construction, Alteration and Remodeling (2)
name.str_pl: copies of Gunsmithing: A Manual of Firearm Design, Construction, Alteration and Remodeling (2)

variants.description: A major biography of John Moses Browning, "the Thomas Edison of guns", this book describes his story, and the inventions he made, as well as decisions behind their development, processes, manufacturing, and usage.

name.str: The Guns of John Moses Browning (2)
name.str_pl: copies of The Guns of John Moses Browning (2)

variants.description: A big magazine about different gunsmithing projects, from tuning your gun to making a brand new one using common techniques.

name.str: DIY Guns: Easy DIY Gunsmithing Projects (2)
name.str_pl: issues of DIY Guns: Easy DIY Gunsmithing Projects (2)

variants.description: This book details the long story of crossbows - a devastating weapon which improved medieval distance warfare drastically - with lot of illustrations and information about additional weapons, like ballistae and catapults.

name.str_pl: copies of The Book of the Crossbow (2)

variants.description: An interesting quarterly report about rocket launchers and recoilless rifles.  There are lots of large, exciting photos of explosions and weaponry.
DIY guide about different ballistic launchers, how they work, and how to build one.

name.str_pl: copies of Launchers, Lobbers and Rockets Engineer (1)

variants.description: This book shows the history of Soviet Multiple Rocket Launcher systems, developed in a late 1930s, the reasons to use it, problems solved while designing them, and tactics for using them.
Part of a big series about different small arms, this book details RPGs - how they were created, how they were used, and how they are used now in modern times.

name.str_pl: copies of The Rocket Propelled Grenade (1)

variants.description: A professional magazine about artillery, published by the US Field Artillery Corps.  Lots of articles analyze using modern artillery in different wars, modern and future technologies, and the most recent discoveries in ballistics and field engineering.

name.str_pl: copies of Jane's Mortars and Rocket Launchers (3)

variants.description: An incredibly detailed guide to modern rockets, mortars, grenade launchers, and recoilless weaponry.  Lavishly illustrated with color photographs, it contains a wealth of information.

name.str_pl: copies of Jane's Mortars and Rocket Launchers (3)

variants.description: Part of a big series about different small arms, this book tells about the M79.  Created to fill the gap between hand grenade and light mortar, this weapon became an iconic symbol of the Vietnam War, and still serves its role perfectly.

A giant, comprehensive list of every U.S. Army weapon, munition, and piece of equipment that was used during World War II, with small, but detailed information about each of them.  Volume 3 describes light weapons like grenade launchers, recoilless rifles, man-portable anti-tank and air-defense missiles and mortars, and Volume 4 describes different heavy ammunition from 20mm to 16 inch hand and rifle grenades.

name.str: Catalogue of Standard Ordnance Items: Volume 3 & 4 (3)
name.str_pl: copies of Catalogue of Standard Ordnance Items: Volume 3 & 4 (3)

variants.description: Official U.S. Army manual about principles and functions for fire support elements and field artillery.  Most of it is about the functions and operations of artillery, alongside some ballistic calculations.

name.str: FM 3-09: Fire Support and Field Artillery Operations (3)
name.str_pl: copies of FM 3-09: Fire Support and Field Artillery Operations (3)

variants.description: Official U.S. Army manual about using different light weapons - M203, ITAS M41, TOW and Javelins.
Official U.S. Army manual for using the M67 anti-tank rifle - theory, practice, and essential information.

name.str_pl: copies of FM 23-11: 90mm Recoilless Rifle, M67 (3)

variants.description: A detailed, full-colored guide to flamethrowers, incendiary weapons, and napalm.  It builds off of information provided in its sister book, Jane's Mortars and Rocket Launchers, and so it's mostly incomprehensible to anyone without prior knowledge.

name.str_pl: copies of Jane's Flamethrowers and Firestarters (3)
copies of MIT Guide to Lock Picking (2)

variants.description: A home-made booklet with large black-and-white pictures of several types of modern locks and general information on how to crack them open.

name.str_pl: copies of MIT Guide to Lock Picking (2)

variants.description: It says it is a reproduction of the United States Central Intelligence Agency's Field Operative Training Manual that describes how to lockpick.  For such a big name it has a surprisingly small amount of information, only covering the topic on a very basic level.

name.str_pl: copies of The CIA Lockpicking Manual (2)

variants.description: This book contain lots of information for experienced lockpickers, like possible tools that can be used, different types of locks that were produced, and even some tips to avoid lockpicking - sometimes it's easier to break a lock, door, or even wall itself.

name.str_pl: copies of Keys To The Kingdom (2)

variants.description: The combined experience of a few different locksmiths of how to do it properly, what skillset is required, and where it is legal to use it.  It says it comes with a DVD, but you can't find it anywhere nearby.

This book is a reference work intended for criminal investigators, locksmiths, security personnel, and similar professionals.  It details the history, development, and design of various forms of locks, keys, and other security equipment.

name.str_pl: copies of Locks, Safes, and Security (2)

variants.description: An in-depth look at various styles of close quarters fighting.  There's an amusing essay about dirty tricks in the front section.
A barbaric guide detailing how to win a fight in the worst possible scenarios - mostly about how to retreat from such a fight, but it still has some information in case you have no another way.
This book teaches how to predict enemy attacks, with a nice explanation of how to react to each of them - both defense and counterattacks.
This book shows lot of techniques to defeat an experienced martial artist - brutal and dirty.

name.str_pl: copies of Out of the Cage (1)

variants.description: An illustrated handbook about the human body, how it works, and how to destroy it with fairly easy steps.

name.str_pl: copies of Close Quarter Fighting Manual (3)

variants.description: A well-thumbed hardbound book which illustrates simple strategies and techniques for close quarters combat encounters.

name.str_pl: copies of Close Quarter Fighting Manual (3)

variants.description: "Will You Be The Last One Standing?", asks the author on the first page.  You don't know the answer, but this book contains plenty of info to reach this target.
Different techniques to end the fight fast, easy, and without going to prison.  Luckily no one can imprison you anymore!
This book contains professional instructions to prepare and prevail in dangerous situations, both physically and psychologically.

name.str_pl: copies of Training for Sudden Violence (3)

variants.description: A glossy magazine all about handguns and shooting.  There is a good article about proper sighting near the middle.
Simple beginner's guide to shooting handguns safely and effectively; simple and effective rules with some key information about handguns themselves.
A practical guide for one who want to buy a gun - how they differ, how to choose the right ammo, shooting techniques, and lot of another info.

name.str_pl: copies of The Practical Guide to Guns and Shooting, Handgun Edition (1)

name.str_pl: copies of Defensive Handgun for the Armed Citizen (1)

name.str_pl: copies of Gun Safety: For Home Defense And Concealed Carry (3)

name.str_pl: copies of Pistols & Revolvers: From 1400 to the Present Day (3)

A dedicated journal about various firearms, their usage, and news about them.  Different articles review new firearm models, old models, new attachments, hunting, maintenance, and a lot of other topics.

A history book penned by an anonymous author.  Starting from its design by John Garand and ending with the Vietnam War, it provides a detailed run-down of the M1 Garand rifle's use throughout history as well as its design and quirks with the weapon.
An in-depth magazine all about shotguns and shooting.  There is an informative article about proper shooting stance in the back pages.
A training guide for anyone who never used a shotgun, with simple explanations and drills.

name.str: Gun Digest Shooter's Guide to Shotguns (1)

name.str_pl: issues of Texas Parks and Wildlife (1)

variants.description: An annual magazine about bird hunting, including species identification, hunting techniques, and equipment recommendations.
A small guide to skeet shooting, including rules, equipment, tips, and techniques for improving accuracy and performance.

name.str_pl: copies of The Skeet Shooter's Logbook (1)

variants.description: The beginner's guide to clay shooting, with lots of advice, instructions, and drills.

name.str_pl: copies of If It Ain't Broke, Fix It! (1)

name.str_pl: copies of Shotguns: The Art and Science (3)

variants.description: This book claims to address every problem the shotgunner is likely to face, and offers solutions to ensure that shooters can make every shot count.

name.str_pl: copies of Shotguns: The Art and Science (3)

variants.description: This book shows the history, science and art of the most beautiful shotguns in the world - single and double barrel, combination, hammer shotguns, paired shotguns, special-use guns, and small-bore shotguns from around the world, with detailed information about each of them, and their usage.
Detailed manual about buying, owning, and shooting a shotgun, with additional information like cleaning, safety, and training.

name.str_pl: copies of Shotguns: A Comprehensive Guide (3)

variants.description: An illustrated chronicle of every model designed and produced under the Winchester name, with a wealth of facts, figures, and historically relevant information.

Part of a 1942 army manual, this book contains lots of information about the proper usage and maintenance of all shotguns that were adopted by the U.S. military, including the Winchester M97 and M12, Stevens M620, M620A and M520, the Ithaca M37, the Remington M31, M11, and Browning Automatic 5.

variants.description: A comprehensive book about combat shotguns, covering single- and double-barreled, slide-action, semi-auto and rotary-cylinder shotguns, their usage, service, and tactics.
This book has lot of fundamental information about shotguns, their workmanship, engineering, and art, along with lot of practical trainings for them.
An old magazine about shotguns: their history, models, cartridges, ballistics, accessories, and shooting, along with an appendix on shotgun data and tables.

name.str_pl: copies of Shotguns - Their History and Development (3)

variants.description: A good guide for both sportsmen and gun collectors, this book contains information about classic shotguns and their usage.

A pocket-sized book printed in 2000 by the United States Marine Corps for official use.  It describes the operation, repair, and cleaning of the Benelli M1014 shotgun.  Though specific to the M4, it can provide a wealth of information to the trained eye.
An in-depth magazine about submachine guns and shooting.  There is an exhaustive article about close quarter combat techniques in the front.
A small, shiny journal about the most famous machine gun in the world, H&K MP5, and how it is used currently.

A comprehensive study of the development and use of the sub-machine gun since World War I, including a country-by-country survey of equipment used, with lots of illustrations and precise information.

variants.description: "Knife Fighting Techniques From Folsom Prison".  This book describe fighting with a shiv in the tight walls of a jail.

variants.description: A small, femme-oriented manual about self-defense with knife.

This book aspires to describe and explain the history, design, materials, and demonstrate deployment and drills with the unusual Indonesian weapon known as the karambit knife.  The final impression is disappointing.

name.str_pl: copies of Secrets of the Karambit (4)

variants.description: A comprehensive compendium about different types of knives and their usage in various martial arts.

name.str_pl: copies of Combat Knives and Knife Combat (4)

variants.description: "The Art of Knife Fencing & the Chronicles of the Modern Fighting Knife and their Wielders".  This book teaches the reader how to defend against an aggressor with various weapons.

variants.description: The world's leading resource about aquatic sports.
A shiny magazine about fitness, nutrition, and sports, mostly oriented towards men.
A quarterly issue about natural bodybuilding, weightlifting, and powerlifting.
A magazine about mainstream fitness and simple bodybuilding, containing articles about different training techniques, nutrition tips, and doctor recommendations.
A monthly issue which covers mostly fitness and bodybuilding themes.  Lots of muscular men aggressively poke at you from the cover.
A small magazine about the bicycle scene, tips about the buying and maintenance of bikes, and different types of training you can do with them.

name.str_pl: copies of Water Survival Training Field Manual (3)

variants.description: A commercially produced survival guide that details swimming and deep water survival techniques tailored to emergency scenarios.

name.str_pl: copies of Water Survival Training Field Manual (3)

variants.description: "A Science-Based Guide to Healing Painful Joints, Preventing Injuries, and Rebuilding Your Body".  This book details a way to build your body without painful and exhausting training, with a proper training program and step-by-step instructions.
This book contains comprehensive information about how anatomy and physiology function in running, training plans, and many new exercises for new runners.

"A Systematic Approach to Gymnastics and Bodyweight Strength", this thick book is a gold mine of information about strength-oriented bodyweight workout, including scientific principles, different routines, methods, detail about progression, and a huge variety of exercises and their modifications.
A step-by-step guide about fitness and working out using only your body, with a huge variety of difficulties in exercises.
200 pages of different squat trainings, with comprehensive info on what each of them is designed to train.
The best book for someone who wants to build a better body - from the start to an advanced level.

name.str_pl: copies of Functional Training and Beyond (3)

variants.description: Concepts, methods, exercises and programs for athletes of different sports, with demonstrations, commentary, and analysis of key exercises.

name.str_pl: copies of New Functional Training for Sports (3)

variants.description: "How to Train for Anything and Everything, Anywhere and Everywhere", this book contains different types of trainings for everyone.

name.str_pl: copies of The World's Fittest Book (3)

variants.description: The cutting-edge training program to make you stronger than ever, from zero to superhuman, in a year.
A training manual for someone ready to spend lot of time and energy on training, with detailed instructions and comments.

name.str_pl: copies of Hard Work Pays Off (3)
copies of Sewing Techniques for Designers (6)
copies of Ye Scots Beuk o Tailorin' (5)

variants.description: A biannual magazine devoted to the art and science of discus-throwing.
This book has pretty good information about ways to throw a hatchet, from a World Axe Throwing Championship champion.  You are surprised there was a championship for axe throwing.
Illustrated booklet, that covers the basics of knife throwing.

name.str_pl: copies of Sergeant Shenk's Comprehensive Book on Knife Throwing (1)
copies of The Complete Guide to Pitching (3)

variants.description: A detailed guide for baseball pitchers that combines time-tested techniques and information mixed with a common sense approach to pitching.

name.str_pl: copies of The Complete Guide to Pitching (3)

variants.description: A precise handbook for someone who wants to win a throwing tournament.

name.str: The Ultimate Guide to Knife Throwing (3)
name.str_pl: copies of The Ultimate Guide to Knife Throwing (3)

variants.description: A small, simple guide on how to throw a projectile, with different techniques, guides, and tricks.

name.str_pl: copies of Guide to Knife & Ax Throwing (3)

variants.description: A small book on the long history of projectile throwing and the people building the sport.  It serves as a guide for someone who wants to get into it, with useful drills and diagrams.

name.str: Knife & Tomahawk Throwing: The Art of the Experts (3)
name.str_pl: copies of Knife & Tomahawk Throwing: The Art of the Experts (3)

variants.description: The author and several experts cover topics like what makes a ball break, bounce, and fly; how material science and physics work together to make the bat function; how hitters use physics, geometry, and force to connect; baseball injuries; and much more.

name.str_pl: copies of Booby Traps, IEDs, Mines and You: A Primer (3)

variants.description: An exciting monthly magazine about boxing.  There are lots of large, colorful photos of pugilistic exploits.
A brutal book about using dirty tricks to disrupt your enemies, and using this advantage to knockout or even kill them.
"A Street Warrior's Guide To Tactical Combat Stances", this book provides plenty of information about how stance changes your movement, and how to use each of them with maximum effect.
Despite having a pretty odd name, this book provides a lot of information about fighting techniques, and different tactics and skills you need to obtain to use them properly.

name.str: First Strike: End a Fight in Ten Seconds or Less! (1)
name.str_pl: copies of First Strike: End a Fight in Ten Seconds or Less! (1)

variants.description: This book contains lot of images showing how to use different attacks in close quarters, but someone has hand-written "lame" on the cover.

name.str_pl: copies of Street Lethal: Unarmed Urban Combat (1)

variants.description: "Turn your fist into a weapon of mass destruction!"  This book details different training programs to train your body overall and to temper your hands and nerves into unstoppable forces.
It seems to be a wrestling manual, poorly photocopied and released on spiral-bound paper.  Still, there are lots of useful tips for unarmed combat.
A detailed explanation of how to train your hands, arms and fists to crush the heads of your opponents, with lot of photos and instructions.

name.str_pl: copies of Turn Your Fists Into Sledgehammers! (3)

variants.description: A book with a creepy image of death with a scythe on the cover, it guides the user on different attacks that can be combined to overwhelm and destroy your enemy in seconds.

This book shows how to use sucker punches - fast and unexpected attacks - to take advantage in a street fight.  Not as useful as before, but it still contains solid information about certain skills and trainings.

name.str: Knockout: The Ultimate Guide to Sucker Punching (3)
name.str_pl: copies of Knockout: The Ultimate Guide to Sucker Punching (3)

variants.description: A shabby book about possible street dangers the author met in his long life, ways to deal with them, and the skill set that such situations require.

name.str_pl: copies of Killer Instinct: Unarmed Combat for Street Survival (3)

variants.description: This book explains simple rules that you need to rely on to fight an enemy of different constitution, with techniques and tactics.
